violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety with RIDOH. Per PIC, application will be dropped off today. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2025
The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety certified with RIDOH. Application provided. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2025

Raw animal foods (beef) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (cucumber) in the reach-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2025

Chicken was observed held at 98 degrees Fahrenheit in the prep area. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC reheated chicken. Establishment to no longer hold food at room temperature. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2025

All foods was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2025

The presence of flying insects is not controlled. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the shelving of refrigeration units have an accumulation of bio-film. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2025

Staff failed to sanitize equipment and utensils after washing and rinsing them. After being cleaned, equipment and utensils must be sanitized in the 3-bay-sink or dishwasher. PIC purchased bleach at the time of inspection. Staff began sanitizing equipment/utensils. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2024

Various foods were observed held above 41 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Foods placed in unit after opening were relocated. Cole slaw was held overnight and disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2024

The door to the outside, located in the back, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2024

Bags of flour were observed stored on the floor in the kitchen. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. PIC placed plastic rack under bags of flour. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2024

Prep unit door gaskets were observed in poor repair. The dressing fridge was observed iced over an unable to hold an adequate ambient temperature. Unit taken out of service. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the shelving in various locations have an accumulation of rodent droppings. All shelving/areas to be cleaned end of day. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2024

The floor in the kitchen area has an accumulation of soil residue, food debris and grease. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2024

The presence of flies is not controlled as evidenced by live activity in the kitchen. The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by rodent droppings throughout the establishment and live activity near outside refuse area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment must increase pest control visits to at least 1x weekly until pest activity is resolved. Plan of action by pest control company to be reviewed by inspector at next visit. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/11/2023

The pizza prep unit was observed maintaining an ambient of 53 degrees Fahrenheit. Unit taken out of service at the time of inspection. Unit cannot be used until it can be replaced/repaired/serviced. New Violation. Correct By: 08/18/2023

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the back outside area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/11/2023

Raw animal foods (shelled eggs and raw fish) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (bread) in the 1 dr refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. New Violation. Correct By: 08/04/2023

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (pizza paddle and mixer) were observed with an accumulation of food debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 08/04/2023

The presence of flies and rodents is not controlled as evidenced by live activity. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 08/11/2023
Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package. New Violation. Correct By: 08/04/2023

The cutting boards(wood) and mixing bowl are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 08/11/2023
Pizza ovens located in the kitchen area was not in good repair(missing knobs). New Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2023

The floors in the kitchen area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 08/11/2023

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the back outside area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 08/11/2023
